history.reason: ADR-0023 Stage 2 armed for the §2-qualified candidate families (handover §3). Fail-closed: arming only escalates an unmeasured move-size resolution to an info blocker and enforces a measured FAIL; it enables no sizing. Auto-demotion via scripts/eval_magnitude_shadow_weekly.py --apply-demotions.
